resources.string: View Verified Apps\' source code on the GitHub website in your web browser
View Verified Apps\' privacy policy in app
View Verified Apps\' License in app
View open source licenses of code that Verified Apps uses in app
Replaces background with pitch black background when dark theme is on
Review Verified Apps\' privacy policy and license (scroll down)

Verified Apps privacy policy

This app does not store any data permanently other than preferences, except when you choose to submit an app that is not in the internal database. In that case, the app sends the package name, app label, signing certificate SHA-256 fingerprint(s), and basic client version information to a server URL configured at build time. No other internet connections are made by this app.

This app can see which apps are installed on your device for the purpose of viewing information about them and checking them against the internal database. You can share and copy verification information to other apps using the share/copy buttons. Clipboard content is only used when you tap copy; it is not read otherwise.

You can provide an apk file to this app which will be temporarily stored in this app's cache directory and deleted as soon as it is done processing the needed information about the apk file.

Verified Apps' privacy policy may be updated from time to time. When it does, you will be prompted to accept the new policy upon opening the app.

Last updated: June 3, 2026.

PERFORMANCE OF THIS SOFTWARE.
By checking the checkbox and continuing, you agree to Verified Apps\' privacy policy and license, which are shown above.
View how to donate to Verified Apps\' lead developer in-app
"Shows hasMultipleSigners in the app verification screen. This is useful for contributing to the internal verification info database."
Shows share and copy verification info buttons on the app verification screen
